areas.name: Green Meadow
areas.theme: Sunny rolling hills, soft grass, wildflowers, beginner-friendly
areas.description: The gentle starting region of Wild Haven. Open fields, low capture difficulty, and the friendliest creatures make this the perfect place to learn the ropes.

areas.name: Whisper Forest
areas.theme: Dense canopy, dappled light, fireflies, mysterious and calm
areas.description: A shaded woodland where light filters softly through tall trees. Creatures here are shier and quicker, rewarding patient explorers.

areas.name: Crystal Mountain
areas.theme: Snowy peaks, glowing crystal outcrops, crisp cold air
areas.description: Jagged peaks lined with luminous crystal veins. The thin air and slippery slopes make captures here noticeably tougher.

areas.name: Golden Dunes
areas.theme: Warm sandy dunes, oasis pockets, heat shimmer, golden hour lighting
areas.description: Endless rolling dunes under a golden sky. Creatures move fast to escape the heat, demanding sharper timing to capture.

areas.name: Sky Island
areas.theme: Floating islands above the clouds, soft pastel light, endgame wonder
areas.description: Drifting islands suspended above the clouds, home to the rarest and most legendary creatures in all of Wild Haven.
